live.title: Liverpool vs PSG - Quarter-Final - Leg 2 - 14 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Liverpool face a major test at Anfield as they look to mount a comeback, with Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Alexis Mac Allister key to their hopes. PSG, meanwhile, aim to control the tie through Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Ousmane Dembélé, with Achraf Hakimi and Marquinhos marshaling the defence. Can the Reds ignite another famous Anfield night, or will PSG’s calm and quality carry them into the semi-finals? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: Liverpool face a major test at Anfield as they look to mount a comeback, with Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Alexis Mac Allister key to their hopes. Can the Reds ignite another famous Anfield night, or will PSG’s calm and quality carry them into the semi-finals? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

live.title: Atletico vs Barcelona - Quarter-Final - Leg 2 - 14 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Atlético Madrid step into a decisive second leg aiming to assert themselves, with Antoine Griezmann, Koke and Jan Oblak pivotal to their push. Barcelona, meanwhile, will throw everything at the tie, relying on the class of Robert Lewandowski, Pedri and Lamine Yamal. Will Barça overturn the deficit on the road, or will Atlético stroll into the semi-finals? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
